answer:
<think> Gary Harrison started his career in the 1970s and is a songwriter. To find out how many major-label recorded songs he has written, I would need access to specific data about his career. However, the question mentions that he has written over a certain number of major-label recorded songs, including several number-one hits. I don't have that exact number, but I do know that Bryan White is an American country music artist who has recorded some of Harrison's work. </think>

<answer> Gary Harrison has written several major-label recorded songs, some of which have been number-one hits. One of these songs was recorded by American country music artist Bryan White. </answer>
